summary: Classified the mixed PR inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no merge/fix/close action is allowed by the job, one linked security-sensitive issue is quarantined, and all open PRs remain open for maintainer/proof/review follow-up.

actions.reason: Open issue has the explicit security-sensitive gate in live preflight state; do not close, comment, label, or fix it through Clownfish.
Useful non-security PR should stay open for maintainer review; this inventory job is not allowed to merge or raise a fix.
Keep open as a useful web_search routing candidate; merge/fix decisions require maintainer review and are disabled for this job.
Keep open for proof and maintainer/API review; no conservative close or autonomous fix path is allowed.
Keep open for maintainer follow-up; there is useful code and active user validation, but no merge or close gate is satisfied.
Keep open as a narrow follow-up PR; no closure or merge action is permitted.
Keep open; the PR is not closable under the disabled low-signal policy and lacks proof for merge.
Keep open for author/maintainer follow-up; no merge, close, or fix path is allowed.
Keep open rather than close; technical correctness and scope decisions remain outside this conservative inventory job.
Keep open for maintainer/rebase/review completion; no close or merge action is available.
Keep open as the current contributor implementation for the cron custom-id feature; it is not safe or permitted to close, repair, or merge here.
Keep open as related context for #75065; do not close against a blocked unmerged PR.
Keep open until the candidate fix is merged or current main is proven fixed; post-merge closeout is disabled.
Keep open as related issue context while overlapping web_search PRs remain unmerged and unfinalized.
Keep open as a related web_search candidate; do not close or canonicalize it against #77736 in this shard.
